testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: msedgedriver at location drivers/msedgedriver.exe, does not exist For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location/ Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: driver.version: EdgeDriver

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.remote.NoSuchDriverException: msedgedriver at location drivers/msedgedriver.exe, does not exist For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location/ Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: driver.version: EdgeDriver at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverFinder.getPath(DriverFinder.java:76) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverFinder.getPath(DriverFinder.java:33) at org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver.generateExecutor(EdgeDriver.java:71) at org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver.<init>(EdgeDriver.java:61) at org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver.<init>(EdgeDriver.java:57) at org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver.<init>(EdgeDriver.java:49) at org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver.<init>(EdgeDriver.java:45) at factory.DriverFactory.initDriver(DriverFactory.java:61) at hooks.DriverHook.setup(DriverHook.java:14)
